caption: A static shot captures the exterior of a modern, two-story beige house with a grey tiled roof. The home features a paved driveway and a manicured green lawn with several small, rounded shrubs and a sago palm. A dark red front door is visible, set back within an arched entryway next to a large glass window. To the right, a garage with a red door is partially visible. In the background, other residential houses and palm trees are seen under a bright, overcast sky. Throughout the sequence, the camera remains stationary, and there is no movement from people or animals. The lighting remains consistent across the frames, and there is no on-screen text or logos. The scene is entirely still, showing a quiet suburban residential setting.
